'''Galentro Armaments''',<ref name="BFH" /> also known as '''Galentro Arms''',<ref name="TOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref> were an armament manufacturing company. They produced the [[Anti-Vehicle Explosive]].<ref name="BFH" />
